samples.xml_description:
<module id="serial2parallel">
    <description>Implement a series-parallel conversion circuit.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Reset signal (active low).</input>
        <input id="din_serial">Serial input data.</input>
        <input id="din_valid">Validity signal for input data.</input>
        <output id="dout_parallel" width_description="[7:0]">Parallel output data.</output>
        <output id="dout_valid">Validity signal for the output data.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <parameter name="cnt">Counter to count the number of input data.</parameter>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" id="cnt" width_description="[3:0]">Counter to count the number of input data.</reg>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        <comment>Implement a series-parallel conversion circuit.</comment>
        <case>
            <item>
                <condition>
                    <equal>
                        <input id="rst_n"/>
                        <constant>1'b0</constant>
                    </equal>
                </condition>
                <action>
                    <assign>
                        <reg id="cnt"/> = <constant>[4'b0000]</constant>;
                        <output id="dout_valid"/> = <constant>1'b0</constant>;
                    </assign>
                </action>
            </item>
            <item>
                <condition>
                    <equal>
                        <input id="clk"/>
                        <constant>1'b1</constant>
                    </equal>
                </condition>
                <action>
                    <if>
                        <equal>
                            <input id="din_valid"/>
                            <constant>1'b1</constant>
                        </equal>
                        <true>
                            <assign>
                                <reg id="cnt"/> = <reg id="cnt"/> + <constant>[4'b0001]</constant>;
                            </assign>
                        </true>
                        <false>
                            <assign>
                                <reg id="cnt"/> = <reg id="cnt"/> + <constant>[4'b0001]</constant>;
                            </assign>
                        </false>
                    </if>
                </action>
            </item>
            <item>
                <condition>
                    <and>
                        <equal>
                            <input id="cnt"/>
                            <constant>[4'b1000]</constant>
                        </equal>
                        <equal>
                            <input id="din_valid"/>
                            <constant>1'b1</constant>
                        </equal>
                    </and>
                </condition>
                <action>
                    <assign>
                        <output id="dout_parallel"/> = <concat>
                            <input id="din_serial"/>
                            <output id="dout_parallel"/>[7:1]
                        </concat>;
                        <output id="dout_valid"/> = <constant>1'b1</constant>;
                    </assign>
                </action>
            </item>
            <item>
                <condition>
                    <or>
                        <equal>
                            <input id="cnt"/>
                            <constant>[4'b1000]</constant>
                        </equal>
                        <equal>
                            <input id="din_valid"/>
                            <constant>1'b0</constant>
                        </equal>
                    </or>
                </condition>
                <action>
                    <assign>
                        <output id="dout_valid"/> = <constant>1'b0</constant>;
                    </assign>
                </action>
            </item>
        </case>
    </implementation>
</module>
